# API Checklist: Provide Basic Property Details for More Accurate Estimate

**Purpose**: Validate API requirements clarity, completeness, and coverage for attribute-based estimates.
**Created**: 2026-03-10
**Feature**: `/home/ayra/ECE_493/Capstone-Test-Repo/specs/006-property-details-estimate/spec.md`

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit.checklist` command based on feature context and requirements.

## Requirement Completeness

- [x] CHK001 Are request/response schemas fully specified for success, partial-attributes success, validation failure, and normalization failure? [Completeness, Spec §Functional Requirements, Spec §Exception / Error Flows]
- [x] CHK002 Are response fields specified for incorporation indicators, partial-attribute indicators, and reduced-accuracy warnings? [Completeness, Spec §Functional Requirements]

## Requirement Clarity

- [x] CHK003 Are attribute validation rules explicitly defined for API consumers? [Clarity, Spec §Functional Requirements]
- [x] CHK004 Is the range-narrower-than-location-only requirement clearly expressed for API consumers? [Clarity, Spec §Functional Requirements]

## Requirement Consistency

- [x] CHK005 Do API requirements align with UI flow requirements for indicators and warnings? [Consistency, Spec §Functional Requirements, Spec §Acceptance Scenarios]

## Scenario Coverage

- [x] CHK006 Are requirements defined for API behavior when validation fails or normalization fails? [Coverage, Spec §Exception / Error Flows]
